name: @forgeax/engine-rhi-webgpu
description: WebGPU thin shim implementation of @forgeax/engine-rhi — shape-aligned with @webgpu/types, opaque handle, math-free.

fps.reason: thin WebGPU shim, no runtime canvas; fps reported by hello-triangle / hello-cube apps that drive this shim

bench.reason: shim has no hot path bench; bench focus stays on @forgeax/engine-math

gate.reason: smoke gate is anchored at apps/hello/triangle + apps/hello/cube (forgeax.smokeInvocation SSOT); shim itself has no standalone binary gate
